task_completion.description: ActivInspire application is open and being used to create a flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire application window is visible on the screen with a blank or in-progress flipchart.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the title 'Daily Schedule' and at least 5 vertically arranged blocks with distinct fill colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing the text 'Daily Schedule' at the top and 5 distinct colored rectangle shapes arranged vertically.

task_completion.description: Page 1 blocks contain the required times and activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text inside or next to the 5 blocks reading: '8:00 - Morning Meeting', '9:00 - Reading', '10:00 - Math', '11:00 - Science', and '12:00 - Lunch'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the title 'Homework' and at least 3 labeled boxes for Math, Reading, and one other subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second flipchart page showing the text 'Homework' at the top and at least 3 rectangle shapes labeled with subjects including Math and Reading.

task_completion.description: Page 2 boxes contain text listing homework assignments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text inside the subject boxes on Page 2 describing specific homework tasks for each subject.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'daily_schedule.flipchart' is visible in the ActivInspire title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file manager window in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with ActivInspire's shape and text tools, rather than writing XML code in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent created actual shapes (blocks/boxes) as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual presence of drawn rectangle shapes with fill colors, not just plain text typed on a white background or drawn with a pen tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI creation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands echoing XML content directly into a .flipchart file or extracting/repacking a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be named 'daily_schedule.flipchart' and saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. It must contain exactly 2 pages. Page 1 must have the title 'Daily Schedule' and 5 colored rectangle blocks with the schedule items: 'Morning Meeting', 'Reading', 'Math', 'Science', and 'Lunch'. Page 2 must have the title 'Homework' and at least 3 labeled rectangle boxes for homework subjects (Math, Reading, and one other). Total rectangle shapes across both pages must be at least 8.
